prompt: Edit image 1 (code) by overlaying object detection results. Add bounding boxes and masks around detected code elements using the distressed, textured style from image 2. Apply a subtle glowing highlight to these detected areas, inspired by the reflection of city lights on water in image 3.
prompt_refined: Edit the source image, image 1, which displays lines of computer code on a dark background. Overlay visual indicators of object detection by drawing rectangular bounding boxes and generating semi-transparent mask overlays around significant individual code elements or blocks of code. These bounding boxes and masks should feature a distressed, textured, and slightly worn appearance, inspired by the rough, aged surfaces and peeling textures seen in image 2. Additionally, apply a subtle, soft, and shimmering glowing highlight along the edges or within these detected areas (bounding boxes and masks), emulating the gentle, diffused reflections of city lights on the water surface as depicted in image 3, appearing as if the code elements are subtly illuminated from within or around their boundaries.
objects: lines of computer code on a dark background
distressed appearance on bounding boxes and masks
textured appearance on bounding boxes and masks
worn appearance on bounding boxes and masks
subtle glowing highlight on bounding boxes and masks
soft glowing highlight on bounding boxes and masks
shimmering glowing highlight on bounding boxes and masks
